Summary: fix: verify_password() missing plain_password argument
Description: PasswordService.verify_password() only accepts hashed_password but argon2 verify() requires both hash and plain password. It will always fail. Fix: add plain_password param and call self.ph.verify(hashed_password, plain_password).

Summary: fix: auth route swallows exceptions and returns HTTP 200 on errors
Description: auth.py catches all exceptions and returns ApiErrorResponse with HTTP 200. The app-level BaseAppException handler in main.py is wired up but never invoked. Errors should raise exceptions so handlers fire correctly.

Summary: fix: remove print(exc.errors()) debug leftover in main.py
Description: print(exc.errors()) left in the RequestValidationError handler. Should be removed or replaced with a logger call.

Summary: fix: JWT_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES value is in seconds not minutes
Description: Setting is (60 * 60) * 1 = 3600 but the name says minutes. Token actually expires in 2.5 days. Either rename the setting to JWT_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_SECONDS or fix the value to 60.

Summary: feat: add login endpoint
Description: Only signup is implemented. Add POST /api/v1/auth/login that validates credentials and returns a JWT access token. A template with no login endpoint is not useful.

Summary: feat: implement JWT token generation and validation
Description: JWT settings exist in settings.py but nothing generates or validates tokens. Add utilities for token creation and a get_current_user dependency for protected routes.

Summary: feat: add /health endpoint
Description: Add a GET /health endpoint returning service status. Standard practice for infra, load balancers, and deployment readiness checks.

Summary: feat: add tests
Description: tests/ directory is empty. Minimum: unit test for PasswordService, integration test for /signup, smoke test that app starts and /health returns 200.

Summary: refactor: UserService should use Depends(get_db) instead of SessionLocal directly
Description: UserService creates SessionLocal() directly bypassing FastAPI dependency injection. Inconsistent with the get_db dependency already defined in database.py and makes testing harder.

Summary: chore: remove or implement MAX_ACTIVE_SESSIONS_PER_USER setting
Description: MAX_ACTIVE_SESSIONS_PER_USER = 9999999 is a magic number with no implementation behind it. Either implement session limiting logic or remove the setting.

Summary: fix: DEBUG should default to False
Description: DEBUG = True is hardcoded as the default in settings.py. Should default to False. Enabling debug by default is a bad habit to bake into a template.

Summary: fix: SQLAlchemy echo=True should be tied to DEBUG setting
Description: echo=True on the engine is hardcoded. Should be echo=settings.DEBUG so SQL query logging is controlled by the debug flag.

Summary: chore: remove ApiSuccessDataResponse dead code
Description: ApiSuccessDataResponse is defined in common.py but never used. Remove it or start using it.

Summary: refactor: remove_sensitive_info should use a configurable set of field names
Description: The logger only masks password and confirm_password as hardcoded strings. Should use a configurable set so new sensitive fields like token or secret can be added without modifying logger code.

Summary: refactor: ApiSuccessDataResponse.data should be Generic[T] not dict
Description: data: dict gives no type information to consumers. Should use Generic[T] for proper type hints.

Summary: fix: validate_passwords model validator should use mode=after not mode=before
Description: The model_validator in SignUpRequest uses mode=before which runs on raw unvalidated input. Should use mode=after to operate on already-validated field values.

Summary: feat: add EmailStr validation to SignUpRequest
Description: SignUpRequest.email is typed as plain str. Use pydantic.EmailStr to enforce valid email format.

Summary: feat: add password strength validation
Description: No minimum length or complexity rules are enforced on passwords. Add a field validator in SignUpRequest.

Summary: feat: add created_at and updated_at timestamps to User model
Description: User model has no timestamps. Add a base model mixin with created_at and updated_at columns so all future models can inherit them.

Summary: feat: add soft delete support
Description: Consider adding a deleted_at column or a soft-delete mixin to avoid hard deletes and retain audit history.

Summary: chore: update .env.example to document all configurable settings
Description: .env.example only shows JWT_SECRET_KEY and DATABASE_URL. All configurable vars like DEBUG, APP_NAME, CORS_ORIGINS, ENABLE_CONSOLE_LOGGING should be listed with comments.

Summary: chore: add warning comment on CORS_ORIGINS wildcard default
Description: CORS_ORIGINS = ["*"] is fine for local dev but must be restricted in production. Add an inline comment warning about this.

Summary: chore: add pydantic-settings as explicit dependency in pyproject.toml
Description: pydantic-settings is imported directly but only arrives as a transitive dependency. Should be listed explicitly in pyproject.toml.

Summary: chore: add scratchpad/ to .gitignore
Description: scratchpad/ is not in .gitignore. Scratch files should not be committed to the repository.

Summary: chore: remove or populate empty app/utils/ and app/enums/ directories
Description: Empty directories add noise. Either add example content (a common enum, a date util) or remove them.
